news.headline: Nalunaq Mineral Resource Estimate sees substantial rise in numbers.
news.summary: A recent report states that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, a decrease of 0.5% from last month. The report also reveals that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations. The sectors showing the most growth were healthcare, technology, and hospitality. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 2.5% compared to last year. These positive indicators suggest a strong and improving economy and job market.

news.headline: Nordecon signed a €3.7 million contract to build a facility for Estonian Defence in Harju County, expected to finish by 2026.
news.summary: Nordecon AS and the Estonian Centre for Defence Investments have recently inked a deal for the creation and development of a new building facility located in Harju County. The contract holds a significant value of 3.7 million euros, excluding VAT, with plans for the construction to be finalized by spring 2026.

news.headline: JDE Peet’s awarded Fair Pay Leader certification for gender pay equity across global workforce.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on March 28, 2025, the Fair Pay Innovation Lab (FPI) awarded JDE Peet’s, the top coffee and tea company globally, with the esteemed Fair Pay Leader certification. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to pay equity, showcasing their efforts in achieving fairness in compensation. The certification signifies that there are no notable gender-based pay disparities within JDE Peet’s worldwide staff. This acknowledgment underscores JDE Peet’s pledge to fostering a work environment that upholds fair and equal remuneration practices.

news.headline: Vastned (VASTB) announced the convocation for its general meeting on 30 April 2025 at 2.30 pm in Antwerp.
news.summary: Vastned NV, listed on Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol VASTB, has announced the schedule for its upcoming annual general meeting for shareholders. The meeting is set to take place on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 2:30 pm at the company's headquarters located at Generaal Lemanstraat 61, 2018 Antwerp.

news.headline: Pharming Group N.V. will take part in investor conferences in April 2025. Trading as PHARM on Euronext Amsterdam and PHAR on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Pharming Group N.V. has disclosed its participation in upcoming investor conferences for April. The company's management is set to attend forums to present Pharming's information. Pharming Group N.V. is listed on Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol PHARM and on Nasdaq as PHAR. The conferences provide an opportunity for investors to engage with the company's representatives and learn more about its operations and future prospects.

Caledonia Mining Corp changes payment date for April dividend; original announcement released on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: An update has been made to the quarterly dividend announcement by Caledonia, as per the release dated March 24, 2025, at 07:00 GMT under RNS No 7270B.

Capital Honda in Charlottetown welcomes 2025 Honda Civic Hatchback Sport to inventory, offering stylish option for PE drivers.
news.summary: Exciting news as Capital Honda in Charlottetown, PE, introduces the latest addition to its inventory - the 2025 Honda Civic Hatchback Sport. This stylish and sporty vehicle is now available for Charlottetown drivers seeking a dynamic driving experience. Don't miss out on exploring the features of the 2025 Honda Civic at Capital Honda!

Novaturas' audited report for 2024 delayed to May 12, 2025 from original date of April 30, 2025, for quality assurance.
news.summary: Novaturas has announced a rescheduling of the publication date for its audited financial statement for 2024 due to objective circumstances. The report, which was originally set to be released on April 30, 2025, will now be made public on May 12, 2025. This delay is attributed to the extended duration of financial report preparation and audit procedures beyond the initial timeline. The company emphasized the importance of ensuring the quality and precision of the reports as the reason behind the revised publication date.

news.headline: US aims to dominate future key Ukrainian investment as per Bloomberg report.
FPT partners with AUO Display Plus to drive tech innovation in smart solutions, sign MoU for improving production processes.
news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, a recent partnership was announced between FPT, a global IT services provider, and AUO Display Plus, a prominent smart display solutions company. The Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed by the two entities aims to advance technology innovation in sectors like smart office solutions, smart healthcare, and smart factories. Through this collaboration, focus will be on utilizing emerging technologies to improve production processes for more efficiency and quality at AUO Display Plus.

news.headline: Fujitsu reveals Quantum Simulator Challenge winners for 2024, promoting innovation in quantum computing applications.
news.summary: In Kawasaki, Japan, on March 28, 2025, Fujitsu revealed the champions of its Quantum Simulator Challenge 2024. This contest aimed to spur open innovation and pinpoint practical applications of quantum computing. Research groups were evaluated based on their tangible ideas for utilizing quantum technology. The challenge attracted an impressive number of submissions globally, highlighting the growing interest and momentum in this field. Through this initiative, Fujitsu seeks to accelerate the development and implementation of quantum computing solutions by recognizing and supporting innovative proposals.

news.headline: Job opportunity available at Societe Generale Group. Apply now!
Judge rules Logan Paul can sue "Coffeezilla" over defamatory remarks on failed CryptoZoo project. Paul seeks $2.3 million refund for buyers.
news.summary: A Texas magistrate judge has recommended that federal Judge Orlando Garcia deny Stephen Findeisen's motion to dismiss Logan Paul's defamation lawsuit against him. The lawsuit stems from alleged defamatory remarks Findeisen made about Paul's failed CryptoZoo project, including calling Paul a "serial scammer" and CryptoZoo a "scam" and "massive con." Paul claimed these statements caused damage to his reputation. CryptoZoo was supposed to be a blockchain game allowing players to buy NFT "eggs" that would hatch into animals, but the game has not materialized. Findeisen argued his statements were opinions, but the judge found them to meet the legal definition of defamation. The court has given Paul and Findeisen 14 days to object to the judge's report. This is the latest development in the legal battles surrounding CryptoZoo, including a class-action lawsuit against Paul by buyers and a counter-suit by Paul against former business partners. Paul has also earmarked $2.3 million for refunds to claimants agreeing not to sue over the project.

news.headline: Toyota's global sales increased in February with a surge in Japan shipments; numbers show positive growth.
Porsche faces tariff pressure from Trump's new wave.
Mulberry's commercial chief resigns, adding to company's turnover of executives.
Ukraine facing pressure from Trump's mineral demands,  from approx $10 billion to $20 billion.
Woodside sells Greater Angostura assets to Perenco for $206 million, including offshore oil fields and facilities.
news.summary: Houston-based company Woodside has finalized a deal with Perenco to sell its Greater Angostura assets located in Trinidad and Tobago for a total of $206 million. This agreement includes Woodside's ownership in the Angostura and Ruby offshore oil and gas fields in shallow waters, as well as the related production infrastructure and onshore terminal. The sale of these assets will bring immediate cash flow to fund future projects and shareholder payouts. This transaction follows an earlier Australian asset exchange announced in December.

news.headline: Dow drops 150 points after Trump's auto tariffs announcement, Verint Systems plunges on Q4 miss; Fear & Greed index stays in 'Fear' zone.
news.summary: On Thursday, the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated little change in the market sentiment, staying within the "Fear" zone. The Dow Jones index experienced a decline of more than 150 points as investors reacted to recent tariff news. President Trump's announcement of a 25% tariff on all auto imports from next week, along with impending duties on auto parts in May, impacted the market. European automakers like Mercedes-Benz Group AG (OTCPK: MBGAF) and Porsche Automobile Holding SE (OTCPK: POAHF) saw declines of 1.7% and 2.3% respectively. TD SYNNEX Corp (NYSE:SNX) reported a 14% dip in its shares following the release of its first-quarter results. Verint Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:VRNT) also observed a decrease in its share value. Further details on this can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Analyst: Bitcoin to surpass $109,000 ATH soon despite US economy concerns. BTC seen hitting new highs by Q2 end. Current price: $85,880. Bullish outlook projects $123,000 by June. Bitcoin market conditions weak, volatility persists. Bearish market if Bull Score Index stays below 40.
news.summary: Bitcoin is predicted to reach new all-time highs before Q2, with a potential range of $102,000 to $123,000 by June. Despite recent tariffs and macroeconomic volatility, analyst Jamie Coutts believes the market is underestimating Bitcoin's potential surge. Bitcoin dropped below $100,000, attributed to Trump's tariffs. Currently trading at $85,880, down 3.16% over the past month. Robbie Mitchnick of BlackRock states Bitcoin could thrive in a recession. However, CryptoQuant's Bull Score Index is at 20, signaling weak market conditions. Bitcoin's previous all-time high is $109,000, reached on Jan. 20. $16.5B in Bitcoin options expire soon, with uncertainty on BTC's price trajectory.

news.headline: Crypto is stuck in its 'AOL era,' says Sandeep Nailwal. 10-15 years are needed for full glory. Only 4% own BTC. Adoption path: 3%. Decentralized sectors expected to emerge.
news.summary: Polygon co-founder Sandeep Nailwal compares the current state of crypto to the early days of the internet's AOL era, highlighting the clunky user experience and limited use cases. He emphasizes the need for development in key areas like fiat on- and off-ramps, custody solutions, and hardware wallets to enhance user experience. Nailwal believes that crypto is still in its early stages, akin to the internet in 1998, and predicts it will take another 10-15 years to reach its full potential. Currently, financial use cases dominate crypto, with only 4% of individuals worldwide owning Bitcoin. Despite advancements, Nailwal suggests that crypto is still in the early adopter phase, and mass adoption is years away, with vast potential for alternative use cases beyond finance.

news.headline: SprintRay Inc. integrates API with Align Technology's iTero™ scanners, easing digital dentistry adoption. Los Angeles, Mar 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on March 28, 2025, SprintRay, a prominent player in the field of dental 3D printing, disclosed a significant development. They unveiled a fresh application programming interface (API) collaboration with Align Technology’s iTero™ intraoral scanners. Through this merger, iTero™ intraoral scanners will now be directly integrated with SprintRay’s 3D technology platform.

news.headline: Shanghai strengthens as global investment hub: 2025 Investment Conference unites 100s of reps & institutions.
news.summary: On March 25, 2025, the 2025 Shanghai Global Investment Promotion Conference took place in Shanghai, gathering numerous business delegates, prominent investment firms, and important chambers of commerce. This event brought together over a hundred attendees from various sectors to discuss investment opportunities and collaborations.

news.headline: TIER IV gets Level 4 certification for autonomous bus service in Ishikawa Prefecture, a milestone in open-source software for autonomous driving.
news.summary: In Tokyo on March 28, 2025, TIER IV revealed that their open-source software for autonomous driving achieved Level 4 certification for an autonomous bus service in Komatsu, Ishikawa Prefecture. This certification covers the entire service, marking a significant milestone in the advancement of autonomous technology.

news.headline: South Africa drives Africa's Phygtal sports revolution as World Phygital Community launches campaign in March 2025.
news.summary: The African continent is currently witnessing a surge in competition with the arrival of a new era of sports. Recently, a delegation from the World Phygital Community (WPC) landed in South Africa to kick off a significant campaign. Across the continent, enthusiasm is building as this initiative gains momentum. The event, which took place on March 28, 2025, in Hong Kong, marks the beginning of a transformative period in African sports. Stay tuned as this movement propels the region towards exciting new opportunities.

news.headline: Dupixent approved in Japan for COPD patients, first biologic medicine, based on Phase 3 results with elevated eosinophils.
news.summary: After obtaining approval in the EU, China, and the U.S., the latest approval was granted based on significant Phase 3 trial outcomes in adult patients with high eosinophil levels.

New in Japan: Dupixent, the first biologic medicine for COPD patients, approved. Major breakthrough in treatment options.
Xi Jinping meets global business leaders amidst trade tensions. German investment boosts China’s auto industry amid sluggish foreign investment.
news.summary: Investment from Germany into China's automobile sector stands out as a positive amidst a substantial decline in overall foreign investment.

news.headline: Hyundai Motor Group launches Pleos software brand at Pleos 25 developer conference, unveiling new SDV technologies and collaborations.
news.summary: At the recent Pleos 25 developer conference, The Group introduced its software brand, Pleos, and detailed its strategy for the software-driven 'Cloud Mobility' ecosystem. They revealed a proprietary vehicle operating system aimed at enhancing self-driving vehicle (SDV) efficiency and scalability through an innovative Electrical and Electronic (E&E) architecture. The next phase, Pleos Connect, promises to deliver a cutting-edge solution for the future.

news.headline: HashKey Group and Bosera have launched the world's first Tokenised Money Market ETF, merging traditional finance with blockchain.
news.summary: A groundbreaking Money Market ETF has been introduced to revolutionize the convergence of conventional finance and blockchain technology. HashKey Group ("HashKey"), a prominent digital asset financial services group in Asia, in partnership with Bosera Asset Management, launched this innovative ETF in Hong Kong on March 28, 2025. This partnership aims to combine traditional financial practices with cutting-edge blockchain technology, marking a significant step in the financial sector's modernization.

Shiba Inu attracts more long-term holders than Bitcoin and Ethereum, with 76% holding for over a year compared to 74% for BTC and ETH. Whale concentration raises concerns.
news.summary: Long-term holders of Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) now hold more of its supply than Bitcoin and Ethereum. Currently, 76% of SHIB holders have kept their tokens for over a year, with 22% holding for over a month but less than a year, and only 2% holding for less than a month. In contrast, approximately 74% of Bitcoin and Ethereum investors have held onto their tokens for over a year. It is worth noting that Bitcoin and Ethereum have larger market capitalizations. Detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Until May 30th, Seoul is inviting exceptional smart-city innovation projects globally. They are offering a total of 21 prizes across three categories: Projects (consisting of Human-Centered & Technological Innovation Projects), Leadership, and Special Mention.
